payload.input: "You don’t get to come until I say, not until you’ve made her scream for me, not until you’ve proven you can last more than thirty seconds like a big boy."  Maya is writhing beneath them, her legs wrapped around Ethan’s narrow waist, her heels digging into the small of his back just above where Vivian’s hands are working, the three of them locked in a rhythm that Vivian controls absolutely, the camera capturing the obscene sight of her adult hands guiding the child’s hips as he pumps into his sister, the wet sounds filling the room mixing with Vivian’s filthy praise and Ethan’s broken whimpers.
